name: Pot Sticker Dipping Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Rice vinegar or distilled white vinegar
1 Green onion, including the green part, finely chopped
A few drops hot chili oil
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine soy sauce, rice vinegar (or distilled white vinegar), granulated sugar, minced garlic, minced ginger, and chopped green onion.
2. Add a few drops of hot chili oil to taste.
3. Stir until all ingredients are well mixed.
4. Serve the dipping sauce in a side dish.
